title: Zomato Restaurant Scraper Input
description: Collect public restaurant listing data from Zomato by city and search keyword. For a low-cost test, use one city, one keyword, minRating 4, maxResults 5, and India residential proxy.

city.title: City
city.description: Zomato city to search, for example Mumbai, Delhi NCR, Bengaluru, Pune, Hyderabad, or Chennai. Start with one city for tests.

searchQueries.title: Search keywords
searchQueries.description: Restaurant or cuisine keywords. Start with one keyword such as pizza, biryani, cafe, or restaurants.

categories.title: Cuisine / text filters
categories.description: Optional filters such as biryani, pizza, cafe, chinese, or dessert. Matching is case-insensitive.

minRating.title: Minimum rating
minRating.description: Only save restaurants at or above this rating when rating is available. Use 4 for cleaner test results, or 0 to include unrated listings.

maxResults.title: Maximum restaurants
maxResults.description: Maximum unique restaurant records to save across all keywords. Use 5-10 for test runs.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Residential India proxies are recommended for reliable regional access and are billed as platform usage.
